datasets.name: product_inventory
queryLines:
SELECT
  'Application Landscape' AS product_name,
  'Enterprise Architecture' AS domain,
  'EA Team' AS owner,
  'adoit_product.gold' AS catalog_schema,
  'Daily' AS refresh_sla,
  COUNT(*) AS record_count
FROM
  adoit_product.gold.application_landscape
UNION ALL
SELECT
  'Service Health',
  'IT Service Management',
  'ITSM Team',
  'snow_product.gold',
  'Hourly',
  COUNT(*)
FROM
  snow_product.gold.service_health
UNION ALL
SELECT
  'Application Risk Profile',
  'Cross-Domain',
  'Platform Team',
  'data_mesh_hub.cross_domain',
  'Daily',
  COUNT(*)
FROM
  data_mesh_hub.cross_domain.application_risk_profile

datasets.name: risk_overview
queryLines:
SELECT
  composite_risk_score AS risk_level,
  COUNT(*) AS app_count
FROM
  data_mesh_hub.cross_domain.application_risk_profile
GROUP BY
  composite_risk_score

datasets.name: sla_compliance
queryLines:
SELECT
  al.app_name,
  al.criticality,
  sh.sla_compliance_pct,
  sh.total_incidents,
  sh.sla_breaches
FROM
  snow_product.gold.service_health sh
    JOIN adoit_product.gold.application_landscape al
      ON sh.affected_application_id = al.app_id
ORDER BY
  sh.sla_compliance_pct ASC

datasets.name: incident_distribution
queryLines:
SELECT
  priority_label,
  state,
  COUNT(*) AS incident_count
FROM
  snow_product.silver.incidents
GROUP BY
  priority_label,
  state

datasets.name: quality_checks
queryLines:
SELECT
  data_product,
  check_name,
  check_type,
  CASE
    WHEN passed THEN 'PASS'
    ELSE 'FAIL'
  END AS status,
  expected_value,
  actual_value,
  severity
FROM
  data_mesh_hub.platform.data_quality_log
ORDER BY
  passed ASC,
  severity DESC

datasets.name: apps_by_dept
queryLines:
SELECT
  department,
  criticality,
  COUNT(*) AS app_count
FROM
  adoit_product.gold.application_landscape
GROUP BY
  department,
  criticality
ORDER BY
  department

datasets.name: access_controls
queryLines:
SELECT
  'ea-team' AS principal,
  'adoit_product' AS catalog,
  'ALL PRIVILEGES' AS permission,
  'Domain Owner' AS role,
  'Full control of EA domain catalog' AS description
UNION ALL
SELECT
  'itsm-team',
  'snow_product',
  'ALL PRIVILEGES',
  'Domain Owner',
  'Full control of ITSM domain catalog'
UNION ALL
SELECT
  'data-platform-team',
  'data_mesh_hub',
  'ALL PRIVILEGES',
  'Hub Owner',
  'Full control of cross-domain hub'
UNION ALL
SELECT
  'cto-office',
  'adoit_product',
  'SELECT on gold',
  'Consumer',
  'Read-only on EA gold products'
UNION ALL
SELECT
  'cto-office',
  'snow_product',
  'SELECT on gold',
  'Consumer',
  'Read-only on ITSM gold products'
UNION ALL
SELECT
  'cto-office',
  'data_mesh_hub',
  'SELECT on cross_domain',
  'Consumer',
  'Read-only on cross-domain products'
UNION ALL
SELECT
  'risk-committee',
  'snow_product',
  'SELECT on gold',
  'Consumer',
  'Read-only on service health'
UNION ALL
SELECT
  'risk-committee',
  'data_mesh_hub',
  'SELECT on cross_domain',
  'Consumer',
  'Read-only on risk profiles'
UNION ALL
SELECT
  'ea-team',
  'snow_product',
  'NONE',
  'No Access',
  'EA team cannot access ITSM raw data'
UNION ALL
SELECT
  'itsm-team',
  'adoit_product',
  'NONE',
  'No Access',
  'ITSM team cannot access EA raw data'

datasets.name: quality_trend
queryLines:
SELECT
  product_name,
  DATE(check_timestamp) AS check_date,
  quality_score
FROM
  data_mesh_hub.platform.product_observability
ORDER BY
  check_timestamp

datasets.name: data_product_registry
queryLines:
SELECT
  product_id,
  product_name,
  domain,
  owner_group,
  status,
  sla_freshness_hours || 'h' AS sla,
  ROUND(quality_score, 1) || '%' AS quality,
  freshness_status,
  row_count,
  consumers
FROM
  data_mesh_hub.platform.data_product_registry
ORDER BY
  product_id

datasets.name: contract_compliance
queryLines:
SELECT
  c.contract_id,
  c.product_name,
  c.consumer_group,
  c.agreed_sla_hours,
  ROUND(o.freshness_hours, 1) AS actual_freshness_hrs,
  CASE
    WHEN o.freshness_hours <= c.agreed_sla_hours THEN 'COMPLIANT'
    ELSE 'VIOLATED'
  END AS sla_status,
  c.quality_threshold_pct,
  ROUND(o.quality_score, 1) AS actual_quality,
  CASE
    WHEN o.quality_score >= c.quality_threshold_pct THEN 'COMPLIANT'
    ELSE 'VIOLATED'
  END AS quality_status
FROM
  data_mesh_hub.platform.data_contracts c
    JOIN (
      SELECT
        product_id,
        quality_score,
        freshness_hours,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY product_id ORDER BY check_timestamp DESC) AS rn
      FROM
        data_mesh_hub.platform.product_observability
    ) o
      ON o.product_id = c.product_id
      AND o.rn = 1
ORDER BY
  c.contract_id

datasets.name: data_contracts
queryLines:
SELECT
  contract_id,
  product_name,
  producer_group,
  consumer_group,
  contract_status,
  agreed_sla_hours,
  quality_threshold_pct,
  schema_version,
  escalation_contact
FROM
  data_mesh_hub.platform.data_contracts
ORDER BY
  contract_id

datasets.name: maturity_scorecard
queryLines:
SELECT
  domain,
  maturity_level,
  overall_maturity_score,
  ownership_score,
  documentation_score,
  quality_score,
  access_control_score,
  sla_score,
  lineage_score,
  discoverability_score,
  reuse_score,
  active_contracts,
  unique_consumers
FROM
  data_mesh_hub.platform.domain_maturity_scorecard
ORDER BY
  overall_maturity_score DESC

datasets.name: lineage_sankey
queryLines:
SELECT
  source_layer,
  target_layer,
  record_flow
FROM
  (
    SELECT
      'ADOIT Bronze' AS source_layer,
      'ADOIT Silver' AS target_layer,
      10 AS record_flow
    UNION ALL
    SELECT
      'ADOIT Silver',
      'Application Landscape (Gold)',
      10
    UNION ALL
    SELECT
      'SNOW Bronze',
      'SNOW Silver',
      15
    UNION ALL
    SELECT
      'SNOW Silver',
      'Service Health (Gold)',
      9
    UNION ALL
    SELECT
      'Application Landscape (Gold)',
      'Risk Profile (Cross-Domain)',
      10
    UNION ALL
    SELECT
      'Service Health (Gold)',
      'Risk Profile (Cross-Domain)',
      9
    UNION ALL
    SELECT
      'Risk Profile (Cross-Domain)',
      'CTO Office',
      10
    UNION ALL
    SELECT
      'Risk Profile (Cross-Domain)',
      'Risk Committee',
      10
    UNION ALL
    SELECT
      'Application Landscape (Gold)',
      'CTO Office',
      10
    UNION ALL
    SELECT
      'Service Health (Gold)',
      'CTO Office',
      9
    UNION ALL
    SELECT
      'Service Health (Gold)',
      'Risk Committee',
      9

lines: Data quality checks across all products · Access control matrix · Domain ownership model
### Access Control Matrix — Domain Ownership Model
Each domain team has **full autonomy** over their catalog. Consumers get **read-only access** to gold data products only.
Data product registry · Domain maturity scorecard · Formalized data contracts · Quality trends · Contract compliance monitoring
